description_long: This object is a stylized, retro desktop computer with a large, boxy monitor and an integrated keyboard. The monitor features a prominent, slightly convex greenish screen, surrounded by a thick beige bezel. The keyboard is detailed with raised keys, including a visible QWERTY layout and additional buttons, all molded in the same beige material. The back of the monitor is angular with vent-like details and subtle paneling, while the sides are smooth and rounded. The front panel below the monitor includes molded buttons and drive bays, reminiscent of classic computers from the 1980s or early 1990s. The entire object appears to be made from a single, matte ceramic or plaster-like material, giving it a uniform, off-white color with some green on the screen.
description: A stylized, retro desktop computer with a large greenish screen and detailed beige keyboard, all crafted from a matte, ceramic-like material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the greenish screen, detailed keyboard with QWERTY layout, and front panel buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the monitor's depth, rounded side, and the sloped keyboard base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the angular back of the monitor, vent-like details, and rear panel features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the monitor's side profile and the keyboard's sloped design.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is closed and off, with no visible content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with raised keys and some special keys, no numeric keypad visible.
